description: The game_id hash depends on exact source name strings (book name, page, entry name). Spelling, capitalization, punctuation, or extraneous words in source names will produce different hashes and break game_id consistency across parsers. Need a canonical source name registry that normalizes source names so any parser can look up the correct canonical form before generating a game_id. This prevents broken IDs from typos or formatting differences between data sources.
title: Extract canonical source name lookup table
